name: Level Access
description: Level Access — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: Level Access — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: Level Access: Level Access — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: Enterprise VPAT produced for federal software procurement
Ongoing managed accessibility program with legal coverage
AMP platform monitoring WCAG conformance across app portfolio
Remediation sprint guided by Level Access audit findings
Accessibility training program rolled out to 50-person dev team

pros: One of the most established enterprise a11y vendors
Combines platform, audits, training and legal support
Broad WCAG coverage for web, mobile and documents
Strong experience with ADA litigation defense
cons: Platform UI has historically felt legacy
Heavy services involvement can slow delivery
Overlapping brand with AudioEye after merger causes confusion
review.verdict: Blue-chip accessibility vendor for regulated enterprises, at enterprise pricing and pace.
review.best_for: Regulated enterprises needing full-stack a11y platform plus services.
review.not_for: Startups and SMBs wanting a lightweight scanner.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
